items.original_text: In this paper, we propose a unified data creation pipeline that requires only a single formatting example, and which is applicable to a broad range of tasks, including traditionally problematic ones with semantically devoid label spaces.
items.claim_text: 本文提出一个统一的数据创建流水线，仅需一个格式化示例，适用于广泛的任务，包括传统上具有语义空洞标签空间的问题 [EV-001]

items.original_text: In our experiments we demonstrate that instruction-following LLMs are highly cost-effective data creators, and that models trained with these data exhibit performance better than those trained with human-labeled data (by up to 17.5%) on out-of-distribution evaluation, while maintaining comparable performance on in-distribution tasks.
items.claim_text: 指令跟随LLM是极具成本效益的数据创造者；使用生成数据训练的模型在分布外评估上性能优于使用人类标注数据训练的模型（最高提升17.5%），同时在分布内任务上保持相当性能 [EV-002]

items.original_text: Our data creation pipeline leverages an instruction-following LLM as a generator in conjunction with a single formatting example as a simple yet effective way of imposing structured constraints. Specifically, our approach iteratively conditions the generator on an instruction and a unique formatting example in a JSON format to yield multiple examples that vary in content but are formatted uniformly.
items.claim_text: 数据创建流水线将指令跟随LLM作为生成器，结合单个JSON格式的格式化示例，迭代地生成内容不同但格式统一的多个示例 [EV-003]

items.original_text: Furthermore, as an efficient means of diversifying the generated data, we propose a 'self-reference' strategy, which iteratively samples from the pool of newly created examples to seed the prompt for the next round of generation. Specifically, we outline 4 distinct instantiations of 'self-reference' including random, contrastive, similar, and tree sampling for controlled diversification of data.
items.claim_text: 提出自引用策略实现生成数据的多样化：从新创建的示例池中迭代采样作为下一轮生成的提示，包括随机、对比、相似和树采样四种方式 [EV-004]

items.original_text: The variable option format is structured in a logical sequence beginning with the question x_f, followed by a list of answer candidates Y, and finally the correct answer y_f. ... Fixed Option. In contrast, for the variable option, the expected format consists of the answer candidates Y first, followed by the correct answer y_f, and finally the question x_f. This inversion of prompt components is added to ensure that the auto-regressive model creates questions with predetermined options.
items.claim_text: 针对可变选项（如多项选择）和固定选项（如是非题）两种标签空间，设计了不同的提示组件顺序：可变选项按"问题-候选答案-正确答案"排列；固定选项按"候选答案-正确答案-问题"排列，以确保模型按预定选项生成问题 [EV-005]

items.original_text: Table 3 summarizes the performance of models trained on two types of datasets: the original dataset, denoted by D_L, and datasets created using the different 'self-reference' variants of our single-shot pipeline ... These findings confirm that while there is no substitute for large amounts of hand-crafted data, - demonstrated by drops of up to -40.55% when using synthetically created data - LLMs can play an important role when access is only available to very little data, and in specialized domains. This is demonstrated by the similar or often better performance of D_G models on WinoGrande, PubMedQA, BioASQ and StrategyQA.
items.claim_text: 在分布内任务上，合成数据训练模型在WinoGrande、PubMedQA、BioASQ和StrategyQA上表现与人类标注数据相当或更好；但在其他任务上性能下降最高达40.55%，表明大量手工数据仍有不可替代性 [EV-006]

items.original_text: The results show that models trained on LLM data are consistently and sometimes significantly better at OOD predictive performance than their hand-crafted counterparts. ... For example, a combination of human and LLM created data may yield even higher gains in OOD performance.
items.claim_text: 在分布外设置中，使用LLM生成数据训练的模型一致地优于使用手工标注数据训练的模型，例如在PubMedQA上提升17.53%，在StrategyQA上提升14.63% [EV-007]
items.audit_note: claim声称'每个数据集的生成成本远低于5美元'，但原文说的是'costs well under $5 USD for every single dataset'，即每个数据集远低于5美元，claim的表述与原文一致；但claim说'该成本已计入因重复或格式错误被拒绝的数据'，原文只是说'Factored into this is the cost for data rejected'，并未明确这是成本估算的一部分，而是说明成本构成

items.original_text: The results demonstrate that data creation with LLMs is highly cost-effective, and costs well under $5 USD for every single dataset we created. Factored into this is the cost for data rejected because it was duplicated or ill-formed.
items.claim_text: 使用LLM进行数据创建成本极低，每个数据集的生成成本远低于5美元，该成本已计入因重复或格式错误被拒绝的数据 [EV-008]

items.original_text: Tree-based exploration strategy limits the semantic distance between the seed sample and instances created later in the generation process and therefore yield higher performance on ID data. ... while the Tree-based exploration approach is still a consistently strong one, other sampling approaches are sometimes comparable or better [on OOD]. This is understandable since some degree of controlled noise is helpful, and can be viewed as a regularizer, when trying to generalize to OOD test data.
items.claim_text: 树采样策略在分布内性能最佳（限制语义漂移）；在分布外任务上，适度的噪声（如对比或相似采样）可充当正则化器，有时表现更好 [EV-009]
items.audit_note: claim声称'LLM可以以极低成本生成任意多的数据'，但原文只说'LLMs can play an important role when access is only available to very little data'，并未说'任意多的数据'，claim过度推断

items.original_text: The results of this experiment are shown in Figure 5. There are several interesting insights to be gained from these results. Firstly, using human-labeled data leads to much faster convergence; this makes sense since the evaluation is performed on ID test data. ... Similar and Tree approaches - which were consistently better sampling strategies - demonstrate a steady rise in performance with added data. ... Lastly, the final upward trend of all datasets is meaningful because they indicate that models trained on all the datasets do generally benefit from more data.
items.claim_text: 使用人类标注数据收敛更快；相似和树采样策略随数据增加性能稳步上升；所有数据集最终都受益于更多数据，但LLM可以以极低成本生成任意多的数据 [EV-010]

items.original_text: Despite the capability of our pipeline to integrate with a variety of other instruction-following LLMs, our testing is restricted to ChatGPT (i.e., gpt-3.5-turbo) due to performance bottlenecks and time-out issues with LLM APIs in general. While we also experimented with several recent open-source instruction-following models that distill ChatGPT responses, their abilities to generate well-formatted JSON and comprehend instructions were limited.
items.claim_text: 实验仅限于ChatGPT（gpt-3.5-turbo），因为开源指令跟随模型生成格式良好的JSON和理解指令的能力有限 [EV-011]

items.original_text: An important consideration in our single-shot example-based data creation pipeline is the selection of the initial seed formatting sample. We did not perform an exhaustive analysis to understand the impact of this seed selection on data creation quality, again due to performance bottlenecks with LLM APIs. While we select this seed at random in this paper, it is possible that a more carefully considered approach for crafting or selection of this example may yield better results.
items.claim_text: 初始种子格式化示例的选择可能影响数据质量，但论文未进行详尽分析（由于API性能瓶颈）；当前采用随机选择，更精细的选择可能带来更好结果 [EV-012]
